title: Front Office Manager - Pugmarks India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Pugmarks India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India:
Pugmarks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India!
